items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: UK manufacturers to save millions of pounds a year as government removes offshore wind energy tariffs
items.summary: British manufacturers will save millions of pounds a year as the Government removes tariffs on offshore wind energy components from 1 April.

items.summary: Find the UK's preferential tariffs and Rules of Origin for the agreements contained within the Customs Tariff (Preferential Trade Arrangements) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020.

items.title: Start a new job: step by step
items.summary: What to do when starting a job: checks your employer may do, employment contracts, what to do with your P45 or starter checklist.

items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference, renewables obligation and small scale feed-in tariffs: companies awarded exemption or compensation
items.summary: Companies awarded relief for the indirect cost of Contracts for Difference (CfD), renewables obligation (RO) and small scale feed-in tariffs (FIT).

items.summary: Data for 2025 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.

items.summary: Capacity Market Auction Monitor report for 2026 to 2027 delivery year.

items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Tough new rules force suppliers to fix faulty smart meters

items.summary: We're seeking views on obligations for energy suppliers to improve smart meter operations and  complete the domestic smart meter rollout by the end of 2030.

items.summary: A letter from the Secretary of State for Energy and the Minister of State for Energy to the UKIFDA on the consumer market for heating oil.

items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Capture software.

items.title: Reforms to the Energy Performance of Buildings regime
items.summary: Consultation on changes to Energy Performance Certificates (EPCs), Display Energy Certificates (DECs), and air conditioning inspection reports (ACIRs).

items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Make Work Pay: improving access to flexible working
items.summary: We are seeking views on a new process for employers to follow when handling flexible working requests, as well as insights on flexible working practices more broadly.

items.title: Policy paper: UK support to Ukraine: factsheet
items.summary: This factsheet summarises how the UK is supporting Ukraine following the Russian invasion.

items.summary: Summary of the third meeting of the UK-Norway, Iceland, and Liechtenstein FTA Sub-Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary measures.

items.title: Impact assessment: UK-India Free Trade Agreement: impact assessment
items.summary: This impact assessment sets out the potential economic, sectoral, distributional and environmental impacts of the UK-India Free Trade Agreement.

items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: Clean Industry Bonus framework and guidance
items.summary: The CfD Clean Industry Bonus will allow fixed and floating offshore wind applicants to get extra CfD revenue support if they choose to invest in more sustainable supply chains.

items.title: Businesses urged to take simple steps for smoother trade with the EU
items.summary: Businesses are being urged to take simple steps to prepare for the landmark EU agri-food deal, that will cut costs, slash red tape and open up opportunities for exporters and importers.

items.title: Research: Ambient gamma radiation dose rates across the UK
items.summary: Data received from fixed and mobile monitors measuring the ambient (background) gamma radiation dose rate across the UK.

items.title: Iran, the Middle East and UK energy: factsheet
items.summary: Your questions answered on the impact of recent conflict in the Middle East.

items.title: Statutory guidance: The Provision of Services (Amendment and Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2026
items.summary: This statutory instrument (SI) amends requirements placed on regulators and local authorities by the Provision of Services Regulations 2009.

items.title: Decision: East Anglia Two offshore wind farm: post-consent condition discharge, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for post-consent condition discharge.

items.title: New Permanent Secretary appointed at the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero
items.summary: The Cabinet Secretary, with the approval of the Prime Minister, has appointed Jonathan Brearley as the new Permanent Secretary at the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero.

items.title: Decision: UK-Japan CEPA documents
items.summary: Decisions, documents and meeting minutes from the UK-Japan Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA).

items.summary: Apply to take part in the ECC Teesside selection process for projects seeking connection to the Teesside network by 2032.

items.summary: The role of the UK Emissions Trading Scheme in UK decarbonisation and how the UK ETS Authority is developing the scheme.

items.title: Provision of Services Regulations 2009: proposed reforms

items.title: Baroness Maggie Jones appointed new chair of Acas
items.summary: Baroness Maggie Jones of Whitchurch has been appointed as the new Chair of Acas, following a fair and open public appointment process.

items.title: Look up considerations for trade licences under the Belarus sanctions
items.summary: As part of the statutory guidance, a look-up guide listing considerations for granting trade sanctions licences.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Picketing: code of practice
items.summary: Guidance on picketing for employers, workers or members of the public who may be affected by a picket or any associated activities.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Industrial action ballots and notice to employers: code of practice
items.summary: Practical guidance to trade unions and employers to promote the improvement of industrial relations and good practice in the conduct of trade union industrial action ballots.

items.title: 100 schools cutting bills with Great British Energy solar panels
items.summary: 100 schools across England now cutting energy bills with Great British Energy solar panels.

items.title: Research: Estimating UK intra-firm trade
items.summary: This report develops experimental estimates of UK intra-firm trade and proposes data improvements.

items.title: Guidance: Advanced nuclear pipeline: how to apply
items.summary: How to apply to the United Kingdom Advanced Nuclear Pipeline for advanced nuclear projects.

items.title: Contracts for Difference: Contract amendments to implement Clean Industry Bonus reforms
items.summary: We're seeking views on proposed amendments to the CfD contract that need to be made to implement CIB reforms, and also on hybrid metering, ahead of Allocation Round 8.
